description: CompositionBlue jeans made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex with heavy washed and faded look, has two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing and distressed edging, small zipped coin pocket below the waist at the back, brand patch appliquéd on the waistband at the back, branding embroidered on the right front pocket, torn look with a metal zip and button closureFitLow waist, narrow fitWash careWash inside out using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsTake edgy dressing to the next level with these distressed blue jeans from spykar. The low waisted jeans in blue are perfect for casual outings with friends. Team this pair with a grunge tee, leather vest and leather boots for a great rocker look.Model statisticsThe product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
